case_for: His huge upside (36.9 pts last week, 25.8 in wk13) combined with a strong pregame projection shows he can easily clear a modest 12-point threshold when targets and scoring opportunities align.
case_against: Three of his last six games (5.4, 9.5, 11.8) fell short of 12 points, showing his floor is genuinely low and touchdown-dependent outings can leave him under the bar.
